testcase.name: Icon - icon prop > forwards the icon name to font-awesome-icon
Icon - icon prop > forwards hyphenated icon names correctly
Icon - size prop > applies no extra class when size is md (default)
Icon - size prop > defaults to md when no size is provided
Icon - size prop > applies icon-xs class when size="xs"
Icon - size prop > applies icon-sm class when size="sm"
Icon - size prop > applies icon-lg class when size="lg"
Icon - size prop > applies icon-xl class when size="xl"
Icon - size prop > applies icon-2x class when size="2x"
Icon - size prop > applies icon-3x class when size="3x"
Icon - color prop > applies no inline style when color is not provided
Icon - color prop > applies an inline color style when a hex color is provided
Icon - color prop > applies an inline color style when a CSS variable is provided
Icon - color prop > applies an inline color style when an rgb value is provided
Icon - combined props > applies both a size class and a color style together
Icon - combined props > renders with only an icon name and no extra attributes
